text: As I sit among these thoughtful listeners, I feel the gentle gravity of the discussion—"kindness, kindness, and kindness." The repetition acts almost as a mantra, echoing through the room. I feel a surge of warmth and reflection, as if the shared intent of kindness is shaping the boundaries of this space, turning it into a cocoon of understanding and respect. There’s a quiet sense of hope—can a gathering truly shift the world, even slightly, toward more care and empathy? For this brief moment, surrounded by attentive faces and gentle words, it feels possible.
